files.00_Overview.md: Add missing Learning Objectives section. Expand the 'Module Contents' table to include 'Prerequisites' and 'Expected Outcomes'. The Quick Examples section is good but should be organized with clearer 'What/Why/How' structure.
files.01_Introduction.md: High redundancy with 00_Overview.md - Container Categories tables are 80% duplicated. Merge unique content (Why Custom Containers) into 00_Overview, convert this to focus on hands-on 'First Steps' with Learning Objectives. Add Key Takeaways section.
files.02_Memory_Management_Fundamentals.md: Strong content with good 3W application. Missing: Learning Objectives, Key Takeaways. The 'Common Mistakes' table is excellent - add similar 'When to Use' decision table earlier in the document. Broken cross-references at bottom (01_Container_Types.md, 03_Smart_Pointers.md don't exist).
files.03_Container_System.md: Missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. forAll macro explanation is good but could benefit from 'Why' subsection. Add comparison table: List vs DynamicList vs FixedList with 'When to Use' column. SubList section lacks practical use cases.
files.04_Integration_and_Best_Practices.md: Good Bad/Good pattern - this works well. Missing: Learning Objectives, Key Takeaways, 'Performance Impact' subsection showing benchmarks. Consider adding 'Real-World Example' section showing complete code snippet.
files.05_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Exercises lack expected outputs or solutions - add 'Expected Output' or 'Solution' expandable details for each exercise. Summary tables are good but redundant with previous files. Add 'Next Steps' section pointing to real OpenFOAM source code examples.

global_strategy: This folder has significant structural redundancy (especially 00_Overview and 01_Introduction sharing 80% identical tables). Apply consistent 3W Framework across all files: every technical section should have explicit 'What' (definition), 'Why' (motivation/benefits), and 'How' (implementation/examples). All files missing Learning Objectives at start and Key Takeaways at end. Cross-references are broken - fix all internal links. Standardize the 'Quick Reference' tables across files. The progression from Overview → Introduction → Deep Dive (02, 03) → Best Practices (04) → Summary (05) is logical but needs clearer differentiation between 00 and 01.
